collapsedHeight.description: The height of the content when collapsed.

collapsedWidth.description: The width of the content when collapsed.

defaultOpen.description: The initial open state of the collapsible when uncontrolled.

id.description: The unique identifier of the collapsible.

ids.type: Partial<{ root: string; content: string; trigger: string }>
ids.description: The ids of the elements in the collapsible. Useful for composition.

open.description: The controlled open state of the collapsible.

value.description: The collapsible machine returned by useCollapsible().
